name: Ultimate Tic Tac Toe
author: Poki
description: Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe is the ultimate update to the beloved classic game we all love. Get ready to empower your strategic mind and try to think ahead! How to play: Put a piece on board - Left Mouse Button or Tap About the creator: Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe is created by Codethislab.
